title: Customer Chat Warning Prompt
body: Customer Chat Warning Prompt | As a customer using the chat, | A brief disclaimer (e.g., "For your security, please do not share credit card numbers, bank details, or other financial data in this chat.") appears w

title: Chat input allows forbidden characters
body: Chat input allows forbidden characters | Click inside the chat input.

title: Chat disclaimer not visible on Safari
body: Chat disclaimer not visible on Safari | Open chat widget in Safari.

title: Verify the security disclaimer is displayed upon opening the chat window
body: Verify the security disclaimer is displayed upon opening the chat window | A brief disclaimer warning against sharing credit card numbers, bank details, or financial data is visible.

title: Verify the chat disclaimer is visible and rendered correctly on Safari
body: Verify the chat disclaimer is visible and rendered correctly on Safari | The security disclaimer is clearly visible and not obscured or missing in the Safari browser interface.

title: Verify the disclaimer is present before any user input is entered
body: Verify the disclaimer is present before any user input is entered | The warning message is displayed to the user before they have the opportunity to start typing.

title: Verify the disclaimer remains visible when forbidden characters are typed
body: Verify the disclaimer remains visible when forbidden characters are typed | The disclaimer remains visible and its layout is not affected by the input of forbidden characters.

title: Verify the placement of the disclaimer message matches requirements
body: Verify the placement of the disclaimer message matches requirements | The message is highly visible and correctly positioned according to the specified placement options.

title: Known linked defects for this story: AIP-10, AIP-11 — consider regression and ne
body: Known linked defects for this story: AIP-10, AIP-11 — consider regression and negative tests
